## What & why


## Type of change
- [ ] Feature  - [ ] Fix  - [ ] Migration  - [ ] Docs  - [ ] Ops

## Checklist
- [ ] Access control enforced server/database-side (not only UI)
- [ ] New/changed migrations run via `npm run test:db`
- [ ] No participant PII in logs, analytics events or test fixtures
- [ ] Accessibility: keyboard, focus, labels, contrast checked for UI changes
- [ ] Docs updated (data dictionary / permission matrix / guides where relevant)
- [ ] No secrets committed
